case_title: MICHAEL W THIEMANN et al VS. AGONAFER SHIFERAW

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF THIEMANN, MICHAEL W THIEMANN, LISA D RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SHIFERAW, AGONAFER $3,200.00 PRINCIPAL, $78.00 INTEREST, $140.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,418.00, STATUTORY DAMAGES OF $1,200 ARE ADDED TO THE JUDGMENT DUE TO DEFENDANT'S FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH CIVIL CODE 1950.5 IN BAD FAITH. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF THIEMANN, MICHAEL W THIEMANN, LISA D AS TO DEFENDANT SHIFERAW, AGONAFER
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $80.00) SERVED MAY-17-2012, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT SHIFERAW, AGONAFER
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-02-2012 - JUDGMENT.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-04-2012 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO JUN-04-2012 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFFS ONLY. JUDGE PRO TEM: JEAN MILEFF. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-02-2012 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-02-2012 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFFS, ONLY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,434.00 FILED BY THIEMANN, MICHAEL W THIEMANN, LISA D AS TO DEFENDANT SHIFERAW, AGONAFER ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-04-2012 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-04-2012 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO JUL-02-2012 AT 5:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. DUE TO CLERICAL ERROR, CASE WAS SCHEDULED FOR 1:30PM INSTEAD OF 3:30PM AS STATED ON THE PLAINTIFFS CLAIM. DEFENDANT DID NOT SHOW UP AT 1:30PM NOR 3:30PM HEARINGS. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
